requirements.description: Ensure the combustion chamber display dummy can withstand static display loads and handling loads.
Provide a thermal path for LED lighting heat dissipation.
Ensure the display dummy can be easily removed and installed.
Provide a cutaway window for viewing internal components.
Ensure proper alignment and fit with adjacent modules.
Define the assembly sequence and tooling requirements.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under handling loads.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect assembly order leading to fit issues.
risk.mit: Develop and follow a detailed assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of interface misalignment due to tolerance stack-up.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment and inspection procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to LED lighting.

risk.desc: Risk of damage during transportation.
risk.mit: Packaging design to withstand transportation loads.

Cutaway window for internal component visualization.
Slide rail for easy removal and installation of the display dummy.

verification_focus.description: Verify the structural integrity of the display dummy under handling loads.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness in the cutaway_window due to thin walls.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness in the cutaway_window to ensure structural integrity.

risk.desc: Misalignment of bolt_circle_dummy could affect the overall alignment of the bell_nozzle_shell.
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment features or use precision machining for the bolt_circle_dummy.

risk.desc: Engine_display_cartridge removal mechanism may not be intuitive for museum visitors.
risk.mit: Design the engine_display_cartridge with clear visual cues and ergonomic handles for easy removal.

risk.desc: LED lighting functionality may be compromised if the power supply is not properly routed.
risk.mit: Ensure proper routing of power supply cables and secure connections to prevent electrical issues.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation performance may be affected by the proximity of LED lights to sensitive components.
risk.mit: Implement heat sinks or thermal management systems to dissipate heat effectively.
